text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after Bamboo Memory's debut race...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Good morning!

text_block_list.name: School-Bound Student
text_block_list.text: Good morning.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hi, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Chiyono O! That was one hearty greeting
there! I guess I should expect nothing less from
the disciplinary committee's top award winner!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Sakura Chiyono O is a hardworking, bright, and
truly exemplary Umamusume! She may be in the
same year as me, but I could afford to learn a
thing or two from her!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Thank you! I've been extra eager to do my
best ever since I made my debut.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to work extra hard... and not just for my
races! So I'm greeting everyone like I mean it! Like
they say, "Good greetings bring good carrots!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's so INSPIRING! Hnnngh! No way I'm going
to let you beat me in enthusiasm! All right, I'm
gonna give today my all too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrooooom!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew. ♪ What a far out morning! There was no
way I was going to miss out coming to school with
Tata!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Bamboo, Chiyo! How's it hangin'? ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: G-good morning!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You two have been super-duper motivated since
you debuted, haven't you? Your energy every day
is totally dy-no-mite!♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It totally is! We were actually just talking about
how we're gonna give today our all! We're ready
to BLAST OFF!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen! I, um, I'm going keep working hard from
here on out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm aiming to run in the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Give it your bestest shot, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know I'll always be cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That goes for you too, Bamboo! I'm looking
forward to some totally gnarly performances from
you as well. ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I SHALL NOT DISAPPOINT!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll see you both around, then! ♪ Later, gators!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Maruzen is just so cool... She's always so incredible...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You really look up to her, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I do! She's my role model.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to catch up to her one day... and race
against her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's my dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: SUCH PASSION!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O, consider me blown away! So your dream is to make your role model into your rival! That's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: M-make Maruzen my rival?! I would never even joke about such a thing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I could really do that... If I actually managed
to...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
N-nonono! As if! Plus, I've got a lot to do before I
can even think of that! Like the saying goes,
"You're to lose your own way if on the mountain
your eyes stay!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll be cheering for you with everything I've
got so you can fulfill your dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I want to see you race Maruzen with your whole
heart and being! I just know you've got what it
takes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I feel a little more confident now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Best of luck on your dream too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! We'll both be blazing with red-hot
passion!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...And that's Chiyono O's ultra awesome dream! I
see her in a totally new light now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Both her and Yaeno's eyes were shining like stars
when they were talking about their dreams!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be just like them! I'm not gonna let them
pass me by! No way!
choice_data_list: Let's go all-out with today's training, then!
Let's go all-out with today's training, then!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! Time to let all this energy really
BLAST OFF!
